project.component: { "keyToString": { ".NET Launch Settings Profile.InstanceManager.Host.WA: https.executor": "Run", "Azure - Run Function App.InstanceManager.Host.AzFuncAPI.executor": "Run", "Publish to folder.Publish InstanceManager.Host.WA to folder.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

item.itemvalue: Publish to folder.Publish InstanceManager.Host.WA to folder

task.summary: fix: Update project settings to disable trimming and optimizations for better compatibility
fix: Update route for ServeUI method to include 'ui/' prefix
